channel.title: +मदन-रत्न-प्रदीपः on कल्पान्तरे विश्वासटिप्पन्यः
channel.description: Recent content in +मदन-रत्न-प्रदीपः on कल्पान्तरे विश्वासटिप्पन्यः

item.title: व्यवहारः
item.description: विस्तारः (द्रष्टुं नोद्यम्) Searchable Electronic Edition of the Madanaratnapradīpa (Vyavahāravivekodddyota), transcribed, formatted, and color-coded by Patrick Olivelle, is licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License. Last updated: June 2024 Patrick Olivelle (jpo@austin.utexas.edu) University of Texas at Austin Madanaratnapradīpa (vyavahāravivekodddyota) An extensive digest on Dharma-śāstra compiled under the patronage of King Madanasiṃha Edited by Mahāmahopādhyāya Dr. P. V. Kane Anup Sanskrit Library, Bikaner, 1948 Transcribed and formated by Patrick Olivelle
